# terrible_community_general_aix_inittab (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `command` (String) Command to be executed.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the `inittab` entry.
- `runlevel` (String) Runlevel of the entry.

### Optional

- `action` (String) Action the `init` process performs for this entry.
- `insertafter` (String) After which `inittab` line should the new entry inserted.
- `state` (String) Whether the entry should be present or absent in the `inittab` file.
